subtitle: Back up your data and see how storage works.
backupRestoreDesc: Your data is saved automatically in this browser as you work. Download a backup file regularly and keep it somewhere safe — that's what actually protects you if you lose your phone or clear your browser data.
dataStoredIntro: Your data is stored in Supabase, a real online database. That means:
bulletSync: It syncs automatically across every device you sign in on
bulletAccess: Access is protected by your login and role (administrator, teacher, or student)
bulletLocalSnapshot: A local snapshot is also kept in this browser as an extra safety net
bulletDownloadRegularly: Download a backup file regularly and keep it somewhere safe, just in case
aboutAccountsDesc: Administrators can see and edit everything. Teachers can view students, mark attendance, and view payments. Students only see their own information. An administrator can create teacher and student accounts above.
backupDownloaded: Backup downloaded. Save that file somewhere safe, like Google Drive.
